title: Sinif ve Nesne Ornegi
subtitle: Basit sinif tanimi, constructor ve metodlar.
code:
<?php

class Car {
    private string $brand;
    private string $model;
    private int $year;

    public function __construct(string $brand, string $model, int $year) {
        $this->brand = $brand;
        $this->model = $model;
        $this->year = $year;
    }

    public function displayInfo(): void {
        echo $this->year . " " . $this->brand . " " . $this->model . "\n";
    }

    public function getAge(int $currentYear): int {
        return $currentYear - $this->year;
    }
}

$car1 = new Car("Toyota", "Corolla", 2020);
$car2 = new Car("Honda", "Civic", 2018);

echo "Araba bilgileri:\n";
$car1->displayInfo();
$car2->displayInfo();

echo "\nArac yaslari (2026'ya gore):\n";
echo "Car1 yasi: " . $car1->getAge(2026) . " yil\n";
echo "Car2 yasi: " . $car2->getAge(2026) . " yil\n";

// Diziler icinde nesneler
$cars = [$car1, $car2, new Car("Ford", "Focus", 2022)];
echo "\nTum arabalar:\n";
foreach ($cars as $car) {
    $car->displayInfo();
}

?>
